Home / Services / Deck and Patio Construction

Deck and Patio Construction

Enhance your outdoor living space with a custom deck or patio in Nashville.

Extend your living space outdoors with a beautiful and functional deck or patio from Williamz Constructors. We specialize in designing and building custom decks and patios that enhance your Nashville home's curb appeal and provide a perfect space for relaxation and entertaining.

Whether you envision a spacious deck for grilling and dining, a cozy patio for relaxing with a book, or an elaborate outdoor living area with a fireplace and kitchen, we can bring your vision to life. We work with a variety of materials, including wood, composite decking, pavers, and natural stone, to create a design that complements your home's architecture and your personal style.

We understand the importance of building decks and patios that are not only beautiful but also durable and safe. We use high-quality materials and construction techniques to ensure that your deck or patio can withstand Nashville's weather conditions, including hot summers, occasional ice storms, and severe spring thunderstorms. We also ensure that all of our decks and patios are built to code and meet all safety requirements.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Design Consultation - We'll discuss your needs and design preferences to create a custom plan.
  2. 02 Step 2: Material Selection - Choose from a variety of wood, composite, pavers, and stone options.
  3. 03 Step 3: Construction & Installation - Our skilled team will build your deck or patio with precision and care.
  4. 04 Step 4: Finishing Touches - We'll add the final touches, such as railings, lighting, and landscaping.

Benefits

  • Enhanced Outdoor Living Space
  • Increased Home Value
  • Improved Curb Appeal
  • Perfect for Entertaining

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the benefits of composite decking?

Composite decking is low-maintenance, durable, and resistant to rot, insects, and fading. It's a great option for Nashville's climate.

Do I need a permit to build a deck or patio?

Depending on the size and scope of the project, you may need a permit. We'll handle the permit application process for you.

How can I protect my deck from the elements?

We recommend applying a sealant or stain to your deck regularly to protect it from moisture and UV damage.

Get a Free Estimate
